description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python package that runs on push to main, on pull requests to main, and on creation of tags matching v*. The workflow has three jobs: test, build, and publish. The test job runs on multiple OS and Python versions, checks out submodules, installs dependencies, and runs pytest. The build job runs on multiple OS and Python versions, checks out submodules, installs dependencies, builds the package, and uploads artifacts. The publish job runs on ubuntu-latest, downloads artifacts, and publishes to PyPI using a secret API token.
